title: stackhousia micrantha
intro: Stackhousia micrantha is a flowering plant species in the family Cunoniaceae, commonly known as the small-fruit stackhousia or small-fruited stackhousia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stackhousia micrantha include the treatment of respiratory issues, skin conditions, and wounds, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
